Researchers are editing the myostatin gene (MSTN),

associated with meat tenderness and

musculature, in animals

Approximately 32% of all experiments scraped from ISAAA involved

editing the MSTN gene, where myostatin is encoded.

 

Only 8 experiments ewceived regulatory approval.

Yellow catfish

Sheep

Sheep

Red sea bream

Rabbit

Count

Quail

Pig

7

Pig

Oyster

Olive flounder

Nile tilapia

Horse

1

Goat

Goat

Duck

Common Carp

Common Carp

Data sourced from ISAAA.

All CRISPR and TALEN-edited

animals from 2011-2023.

Chicken

Channel catfish

Cattle

Cattle

Cattle

South Korea

Uruguay

United States

Japan

Argentina
